name_en: Chane1🖤24K bag AS3980 Winter plush mini, warm and cute like a teddy bear. The fuzzy bag will be your best partner for fashion and retro. Fashion and retro have long been intertwined. Undoubtedly a hot item in the fashion world. Stylish people must not miss this must-have. Size 20cm
